name: comfyui-image-manager
description: React-based image viewer and manager for ComfyUI

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:full: npm run build:integrated && npm run build:bundle && npm run build:portable
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf shared/dist frontend/dist backend/dist frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules shared/node_modules node_modules pkg-output portable-output
scripts.db:reset: rm -f database/*.db && cd backend && npm run db:migrate
